asset.title: App Ask Reconcile
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates an agent-driven reconciliation task within a spreadsheet. It shows the command input, real-time cell updates, and trace logs, though text legibility is slightly low due to small font sizes.

featureClarity.evidence: The user executes an '/ask reconcile' command which triggers an agent to update variance values in a spreadsheet.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, the command execution, real-time cell updates, and the final agent summary.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode layout is clean, but the contrast in the trace log and some chat elements is low.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, chat, agents, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing step-by-step execution rather than a polished mockup.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the spreadsheet cells and trace log make it hard to read at standard preview sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly demonstrates automated financial reconciliation, highly relevant to finance and operations users.

productionHonesty.evidence: Shows the actual latency and step-by-step cell updates of the agent's execution.

observedEvidence: Chat interface with '/ask reconcile' command input
Spreadsheet with Q2, Q3, and Variance columns
Real-time cell updates with percentage variances
Room Trace log showing agent actions and lock releases

defects.observed: The text in the chat input and spreadsheet cells is quite small, reducing legibility on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Slightly zoom the browser window or crop the capture closer to the active areas to improve readability.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeAgent automatically reconcile Q3 revenue against NetSuite exports, updating the variance sheet and logging every step in the room trace.
